maximum_life.reason: Triple-dip: defense, spell cost fuel, Gore Spike crit damage

spell_crit.reason: Sunder the Flesh sets 15% base; crit chance & damage scale from there

chaos_damage.reason: Hexblast deals chaos; synergizes with Despair resistance reduction

cast_speed.reason: Accelerates two-beat rhythm (curse → blast); QoL multiplier

flask_recovery.reason: Life-spend mechanic makes flask recovery critical; replaces leech post-0.5

energy_shield.reason: Crimson Power converts ES → extra max life (damage + defense)
stats_to_stack: % of Energy Shield as Extra Maximum Life

life_regeneration.reason: Layer on top of flask/remnants for sustained damage

weapon_focus.example_scaling: Hexblast added-damage effectiveness is high; flat chaos punches above weight

with_crimson: Highest ES possible (converts to life via ascendancy)

unique_candidates.name: The Covenant
unique_candidates.reason: Grants Life Remnants + life-cost casting; thematically on-build but partially redundant with ascendancy

helmet_gloves_boots.note: Movement speed is QoL: rhythm plants feet; time between casts is when you live/die

rings_amulet.note: Chaos res is doubly relevant: melee-adjacent range for remnant pickup

flask.note: Life-spend class makes flask utility tier-0

strong_candidates.name: The Covenant
key_mods: Skills cost life as well as mana
strong_candidates.reasoning: Ascendancy already grants remnants/life-cost. Judge raw ES/life roll vs rare.

strong_candidates.name: Shavronne's Wrapping
strong_candidates.reasoning: If running Crimson Power: ES converts to extra life (damage + defense)

strong_candidates.name: Kaom's Heart
strong_candidates.reasoning: Huge life roll = huge Gore Spike scaling, but locks gem sockets

conditional_candidates.name: Crown of Eyes
key_mods: Spell damage scaled by critical strike chance
conditional_candidates.reasoning: 15% base crit + heavy crit investment makes this a multiplier; validate DPS vs rare

avoid.reason: ES-primary builds conflict with life-scaling pillar
avoid.example: Most ES-focused uniques; blood mage pays to bleed, not shield

S_tier.synergy: Spell damage, attack speed (cast speed), flat chaos scaling

A_tier.synergy: Spell damage + defensive mods; decent flat chaos support

S_tier.reason: Highest ES rolls post-patch; ES converts to extra life

maximum_life_mods.note: Stack aggressively; every point is defense+fuel+damage

spell_crit_mods.note: Focus on multiplier after chance floor (15%) is solid

cast_speed_mods.description: Sprinkle in whenever cheap; accelerates rhythm

flask_mods.description: Treat flask like a weapon; it carries blood mage sustain

life_to_crit_multiplier.formula: Crit Damage % = (Crit Multiplier + Life Pool × Scale Factor)
life_to_crit_multiplier.implication: Every life node is a damage node post-ascendancy

curse_to_resistance.implication: Resistance reduction (Despair + curse effect) is a hidden more-multiplier

cast_speed_to_tempo.implication: Cast speed is both damage and rhythm QoL

research_notes.post_0_5_changes: Leech was nerfed; fleet recovery now a triple-layer system (Remnants + Flask + Leech). Flask mods jumped in priority.
research_notes.crimson_power_note: If allocated: body armour ES becomes a direct damage stat via life conversion. Changes shopping priorities.
research_notes.ai_annotation: Use synergy_pillars and synergy_matrix to evaluate gear: does it feed the loop (life → crit → detonation → remnants → life)?
